scenarios.title: browser history navigation leaves the URL on the third page @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to navigation1.html, then navigation2.html, then navigation3.html. Call goBack(), goForward(), reload() in sequence. Assert the final URL matches navigation3.html.
expectedAssertions: after goBack() + goForward() + reload(): page URL matches /\/navigation3\.html$/

locatorTable.notes: Direct equivalent; URL becomes relative once baseURL is configured in playwright.config.ts
navigate().to() maps directly to page.goto() in Playwright
Regex form chosen for environment-agnostic matching; absolute string form is an acceptable alternative if baseURL is always the demo domain. See Q2 and hallucination-defense pin 1.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Final URL assertion after history traversal
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: absolute vs relative URL assertion form — regex chosen to allow any baseURL prefix.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If playwright.config.ts baseURL is always 'https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java/', replace with await expect(page).toHaveURL('https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java/navigation3.html') for exact parity with the source.
